records.title: Finally block out every bit of light — zero-pressure sleep mask
records.description: The Manta blocks 100% of light with adjustable zero-pressure cups that never touch your eyelids. Perfect for light sleepers who wake at the slightest glow. £29 on Amazon.

records.title: Zero light, zero pressure: sleep mask for light sleepers
records.description: Adjustable blackout cups sit over your eyes without touching them — no pressure, no discomfort. Light sleepers swear by it. 14,500+ reviews. Free your sleep.

records.title: Block every light source with a mask built for light sleepers
records.description: Manta's 100% blackout cups are adjustable for your face — street lights, sunrise, hotel rooms sorted. Natural, comfortable sleep starts with total darkness.

records.title: Total darkness, zero pressure: a sleep mask for anxious sleepers
records.description: When your mind won't switch off, total blackout helps reset your nervous system. Manta's zero-pressure cups block 100% of light — no touching your lids, no distractions.

records.title: Block all light to calm your racing mind — adjustable eye mask
records.description: Complete darkness triggers the body's natural wind-down. Manta's adjustable blackout cups sit off your eyelids — zero discomfort, total blackout, every night.

records.title: 100% blackout sleep mask: quieten your senses at night
records.description: Light signals wakefulness — cut it entirely. Manta blocks everything with soft, adjustable cups that don't press on your eyes. A calmer dark for anxious sleepers.

records.title: Sleep mask that stays put: 100% blackout for restless sleepers
records.description: Manta's adjustable cups are designed to stay in place no matter how much you move. Zero-pressure fit that won't dig into your face — blackout sleep, every position.

records.title: Adjustable sleep mask that moves with you — 100% blackout
records.description: Most masks shift or fall off during the night. Manta's adjustable cups grip gently without pressure — 100% blackout stays on through the night, for restless sleepers.

records.title: Stay in total darkness all night — zero-pressure adjustable mask
records.description: Restless sleepers need a mask that keeps up. Manta's secure adjustable fit and zero-pressure cups block 100% of light without shifting — so you wake up rested.
